name: Current Affairs in TN History, Culture & Heritage (1)

sourceRefs.label: usthadian.com - Tamil Nadu State Awards 2025-2026 (Bharathiyar, Bharathidasan, Thiruvalluvar, Kamarajar Awards)

researchNotes: Sixth and final topic in this first lap of the Part A Current-Affairs rotation (Unit VI's turn — completes one full cycle through all 6 units). These TN State Awards are named after figures ALREADY covered in depth elsewhere in this project (Bharathiyar — Day 22's leaders topic; Thiruvalluvar — Day 50's Thirukkural topic; Kamarajar — stashed/Unit III), so this topic deliberately connects the award NAMES to those existing facts rather than re-explaining who each honoree namesake was.

reading.intro: Covers Tamil Nadu's recent (2025-2026) State Award recipients — each award named after a major Tamil literary/political figure already covered elsewhere in this syllabus — directly relevant to the 'Achievements of Tamil Nadu' and 'Current affairs' clauses.

qa.question: Who received the Mahakavi Bharathiyar Award 2025, and what is it recognised for?
qa.answer: Nellai Jayantha — honouring contributions to Tamil poetry and nationalist literary thought (the award is named after Subramania Bharathiyar, already covered in this project's Unit III leaders content).

qa.question: Who received the Pavendhar Bharathidasan Award 2025, and what does it recognise?
qa.answer: The poet Yugabharathi — recognising modern Tamil literary expression and cultural revival (named after the poet Bharathidasan).

qa.question: Who is set to receive the Thiruvalluvar Award 2026, and what does it recognise?
qa.answer: Dr. Sathiyavel Muruganar — recognising contributions toward the promotion of ethical values, Tamil philosophy, and classical Tamil thought (named after Thiruvalluvar, author of the Thirukkural — already covered in depth in this project's dedicated Thirukkural topic).

qa.question: Who received the Kamarajar Award 2025, and what does it recognise?
qa.answer: Idhayathulla — recognising contributions to public life and social development (named after K. Kamaraj, the former Tamil Nadu Chief Minister).

questions.prompt: The Mahakavi Bharathiyar Award 2025 was given to:
The Pavendhar Bharathidasan Award 2025 was given to:
The Thiruvalluvar Award 2026 is set to be given to:
The Kamarajar Award 2025 was given to:
The Thiruvalluvar Award recognises contributions toward:
options: Ethical values, Tamil philosophy, and classical Tamil thought
questions.explanation: Ethical values, Tamil philosophy, classical Tamil thought.
